compiled_state.title: As a practitioner, self-healing loop activity is observable via structured ticket comments
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Each self-healing trigger records a REPLAN_TRIGGER: <type> comment and each resolution records a REPLAN_RESOLVED: <tier> comment on the epic, enabling measurement of escape hatch usage.
**Why**: Without observability, practitioners cannot tell whether the self-healing loop is firing, how often it fires, or at which tier it resolves. This data is essential for tuning the system and identifying recurring plan-level gaps.
**Scope**:
- IN: REPLAN_TRIGGER comment format (drift|failure|validation|review), REPLAN_RESOLVED comment format (implementation-plan|brainstorm), non-interactive mode INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED for brainstorm escalation
- OUT: Dashboard or analytics (future enhancement)

## Done Definitions
- When this story is complete, each self-healing trigger records a REPLAN_TRIGGER: <drift|failure|validation|review> comment on the epic
  ← Satisfies: "each trigger records a structured REPLAN_TRIGGER"
- When this story is complete, each successful resolution records a REPLAN_RESOLVED: <implementation-plan|brainstorm> comment on the epic
  ← Satisfies: "each resolution records REPLAN_RESOLVED"
- When this story is complete, in non-interactive mode, brainstorm escalation is deferred via INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED rather than blocking
  ← Satisfies: observable loop with non-interactive support
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations
- [Maintainability] REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED formats should be documented as a contract

## Escalation Policy
**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. "High confidence" means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.

comments.body: Story complete: all 4 tasks closed (including remediation for REPLAN_RESOLVED: brainstorm), completion-verifier PASS on all 4 done definitions.
comments.author: Main
